Class ShelterServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.impl.ShelterServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ShelterService
public class ShelterServiceImpl extends Object implements ShelterService
Default implementation of ShelterService backed by a ShelterRepository. Delegates all persistence operations to the repository and enforces business rules such as duplicate-name prevention on registration.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Constructs a ShelterServiceImpl with the given repository.

  • Constructor Details

    • ShelterServiceImpl

      public ShelterServiceImpl(ShelterRepository shelterRepository)
      Constructs a ShelterServiceImpl with the given repository. The repository is used for all read and write operations on shelter records.
      Parameters:
      shelterRepository - the repository to delegate persistence to; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if shelterRepository is null

  • Method Details

    • register

      public void register(Shelter shelter)
      Registers a new shelter into the system. Throws an exception if a shelter with the same name and location already exists. Throws IllegalArgumentException if a shelter with the same name and location already exists.
      Specified by:
      register in interface ShelterService
      Parameters:
      shelter - the shelter to register

    • update

      public void update(Shelter shelter)
      Updates the information of an existing shelter record, such as capacity or location. Throws an exception if the shelter is not found in the system. Throws EntityNotFoundException if the shelter does not exist in the repository.
      Specified by:
      update in interface ShelterService
      Parameters:
      shelter - the shelter with updated information

    • remove

      public void remove(Shelter shelter)
      Removes a shelter from the system. Throws an exception if the shelter still holds animals or has pending transfer requests. Throws EntityNotFoundException if the shelter is not found.
      Specified by:
      remove in interface ShelterService
      Parameters:
      shelter - the shelter to remove

    • findById

      public Shelter findById(String id)
      Returns the shelter with the given ID. Throws an exception if no shelter with that ID is found. Throws EntityNotFoundException if no shelter with the given ID exists.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface ShelterService
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shelter
      Returns:
      the matching shelter

    • listAll

      public List<Shelter> listAll()
      Returns all shelters currently registered in the system. Returns an empty list if no shelters are registered.
      Specified by:
      listAll in interface ShelterService
      Returns:
      a list of all registered shelters
